key.name: size
key.description: The (width,length) size gnoMint should take when started. This cannot be smaller than (320,200).

key.name: revoked-visible
key.description: Whether the revoked certificates should be visible.

key.name: expired-visible
key.description: Whether already-expired certificates should be visible in the certificates tree. CAs are always visible regardless of this setting so that any still-valid certificates they signed remain reachable.

key.name: crq-visible
key.description: Whether the certificate requests should be visible.

key.name: gnome-keyring-export
key.summary: Automatic exporting of certificates for gnome-keyring
key.description: Whether the created or imported certificates are automatically exported to gnome-keyring certificate-store.
